examples: He was promoted from chef of ring to headwaiter.
The headwaiter was debonair with the guests but firm with the waiters.
"I'm very sorry, Sir," said the regretful headwaiter. "Oh, it's quite all right," said the guest, "but I'm afraid I'll have to trouble you again..."
He has a Dutch pastry chef, a German refugee headwaiter, and a bartender from the Soviet Union.
When I talked to Aaron, headwaiter at Hero Sushi in Omaha, he says uncooked fish wrapped in seaweed still makes a lot of Nebraskans nervous even now.
